# Joost Helfers

> Berlin-based creative technologist specializing in AI visual production and technical AI solutions.

## About
Joost Helfers helps agencies, studios, and product teams turn complex AI ideas into campaign-grade visuals, working pipelines, and deployed platforms. Background in architecture and computational design (MSc, DesignMorphine). Now focused exclusively on AI visual production and technical AI solutions — generative pipelines, prompt engineering, and full-stack AI tooling.

## Professional Profiles
- Website: https://joosthelfers.com
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/joosthel
- GitHub: https://github.com/joosthel

## Core Expertise
- AI Visual Production — campaign-grade generative imagery and video
- AI Automation & Custom Pipelines — ComfyUI, generative workflows, agentic systems
- Full-Stack AI Tooling — Next.js, TypeScript, Python, API design
- Prompt Engineering — systematic prompt development for consistent, high-quality output

## Case Studies
- /projects/prompt-engine — Live AI tool for prompt enhancement
- /projects/ai-video-campaign — AI video production for a global brand campaign
- /projects/ai-pipeline-backend — Custom ComfyUI workflows and segmentation tooling
- /projects/souly-boondawg — Hybrid AI music video production
- /projects/inyo-digital-twin — Digital twin platform (React, Three.js)
- /projects/msc-arcadia — MSc computational design research
